name: Whole Wheat Sunflower Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to desired temperature.
2. Mix all dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, bread flour, wheat germ, salt, baking soda) in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together wet ingredients (buttermilk, egg, applesauce, brown sugar).
4. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture and stir until combined.
5. Stir in sunflower seeds and orange zest.
6. Shape dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
7. Bake until crust is light and golden brown.
8. Turn off oven and let bread cool completely before slicing.
